Text_output: The duvet was for the winter and even with 23 degrees Celsius on the a/c it was unbearable! No simple sheets on the bed either... Our only other choice was to close the a/c an go without covers but we could not open the windows because it was very very noisy. Also the windows had no soundproofing whatsoever because the noise was too much!! We gave the duvet a chance up to 3 am and then got up and opened the windows when the noise went down. We had to leave to catch a flight at 5am... Not a good night's sleep!!! Also the room had a hair dryer and a kettle that we could not use because the plugs did not fit the sockets and the hotel didn't provide adaptors... So no use of that service in the room either!, Very spacious and clean room.
